variants: Born in Petrel's Bluff, Tien Dang has made significant strides in the field of construction and engineering. He currently resides in Sunnybrook Arcade and is an esteemed employee at Frameward Construction. Tien is known for his innovative work, having authored the transformative invention, Amber Current Stabilizer. His contributions to the industry have earned him the prestigious Shellborn Plaque, a recognition of his dedication and skill.
